creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter: do you still see these problems on newer versions 
of FreeBSD (e.g. 7.0-RELEASE if possible)? 

If so, you will have to provide a lot more information, as I'm 
not even sure what the first problem you mention is.  Do you mean 
that when running "reboot", the system actually powers off?  Or 
that it hangs, and never successfully finishes shutting down?
